searchPlaceholder: Search records, beliefs, relationships, or growth clues
apiErrorFallback: API request failed, page has fallen back to local mock data.

themes.title: Theme
themes.description: A theme is a work atmosphere, not a day/night mode. Current theme: {{theme}}.

morning.label: Morning
morning.description: A calm blue-gray base for organizing and reviewing.

linen.label: Paper
linen.description: A warmer paper and clay palette for a slower workbench.

tide.label: Tide
tide.description: A lighter, cooler palette for stepping back and seeing the structure.

music.title: Music
music.description: Part of the persistent utility area. It offers light company without taking over the page.
music.unsupported: Realtime audio is not supported in this environment. The UI can stay and later be replaced with a real player.
music.volumeHint: Keep the utility area light so it does not cover the main page.

morning.label: Morning
morning.description: A brighter, lighter melody for organizing thoughts.

rain.label: Rain
rain.description: A slower, lower pattern for staying with the work longer.

night.label: Night Reading
night.description: A more distant tone for calm evening work.

notificationCenter.title: Notification Center
notificationCenter.description: Top messages and bottom notifications are collected here for review and follow-up.
notificationCenter.empty: No notifications yet. Save results, reminders, and cross-page follow-ups can be wired here later.

message.title: Top message triggered
message.message: It disappears after 3 seconds by default and suits lightweight feedback like save success.
message.detail: Top messages work best for brief confirmations and lightweight result feedback, not heavy reading.
message.lineUse: Best for save success, completion confirmations, and light reminders
message.lineShape: Keep the message short and actions minimal

notification.title: Bottom notification triggered
notification.message: It stays for 5 seconds by default and suits fuller information prompts.
notification.detail: Bottom notifications fit contextual reminders, suggestions, and actionable information, especially when stacked.
notification.lineUse: Best for task completion, reminders, and suggestions
notification.lineShape: Priority, source, and category can be extended later

persistent.title: Life timeline needs more context
persistent.message: This notification stays until you handle or close it.
persistent.detail: Persistent notifications suit items that truly need attention, such as missing content, confirmations, or cross-page reminders.
persistent.lineTarget: Can navigate to a specific page
persistent.lineShape: Can later become a task, todo, or message-center entry

legacy.label: Life Organizing
legacy.hint: Important handoffs and words for the future

socioeconomics.label: Socioeconomics
socioeconomics.hint: A cognition map of the external economy

capture.title: Capture First
capture.body: Capture first, then organize, then understand why you think and live this way.

review.title: Review Gently
review.body: Do not rush to a conclusion. First look at recent emotions, choices, and rhythm.

future.title: Leave Room for Future
future.body: Make the ideal life more concrete, and direction can slowly become action.

rhythmPopup.title: Slow down and look at today first

explore.label: Explore
explore.text: Trace the causal evolution of four ancient civilizations through a geopolitical materialist lens.

fit.label: Best For
fit.text: Useful when you want to understand civilizational choices and institutional diversity from first-layer geographic constraints.

purpose.label: Purpose
purpose.text: The goal is not to memorize history, but to see how the same survival pressure can produce different civilizational paths.

about.description: A local-first personal life management system
